nodes.label: Bypass pre_flight_gate trading hours check for all tests.
Live submit SOP must pass account/redline context into pre_flight_gate.
Happy path: submit succeeds, verify confirms order → orders_open.json written.
Ghost: submit returns ordno but verify finds nothing → ghost_orders.jsonl writte
Gate block: pre_flight_gate returns passed=False → adapter._submit_order_impl ne
Exception: adapter raises RuntimeError → graceful error dict, state files untouc
Idempotency: same order_id submitted twice → only one entry in orders_open.json.
Live mode lock: live_mode.json absent or enabled=False → rejected at live_mode_g
Live mode lock: live_mode.json with enabled=False → rejected at live_mode_gate.
Live submit counts once the broker submit succeeds, regardless of later fill sta
Ghost orders still consume submit quota because broker submit already happened.
Pre-flight rejection must not consume submit quota.
